posts.author: PatriotSam
posts.title: Asteroid expected to make close pass by Earth, and will be roughly 50,000 mi away tomorrow.

twitter.content: Scientists recently discovered Asteroid 2026 JH2, which is set to make an extremely close flyby of Earth on Monday, May 18. The asteroid will pass within 56,000 miles of the planet — about a quarter of the distance between Earth and the moon.
